description: A unified theory system integrating cosmology, neuroscience, economics, and civilization design. All papers are permanently archived on Zenodo.

papers.title: GKU Theory — Grand Unified Cosmology
papers.abstract: A unified cosmological theory integrating space (Koku), energy (Genki), and consciousness through phase resonance. Proposes the Ma Credit Protocol as the foundation for a resonance-based civilization.

papers.title: BBDDH Clinical Version — Brain-Body Dissociation Disorder Hypothesis
papers.title_ja: BBDDH臨床版 — 脳体乖離病横断診断仮説
papers.abstract: A cross-diagnostic hypothesis proposing that brain-body dissociation is the root cause of multiple modern psychiatric and somatic disorders. Introduces linguistic neural regulation as a therapeutic approach.

papers.title: BBDDH Philosophical Version
papers.title_ja: BBDDH哲学版 — GKUベース意識-身体乖離＋光貨接続
papers.abstract: Philosophical extension of BBDDH grounded in GKU cosmology. Connects consciousness-body dissociation with the Hikari currency system and resonance civilization theory.

papers.title: Genesis OS — The Creative Process Protocol
papers.title_ja: Genesis OS — 受信→蓄積→変換→外化の創造プロセス論
papers.abstract: A systematic model of the creative process: Reception → Accumulation → Transformation → Externalization. Provides the operating system layer for civilizational design.

papers.title: Resonance Civilization Theory — Keystone Paper
papers.title_ja: 共鳴文明論 — 全理論統合キーストーン論文
papers.abstract: The keystone paper integrating all theories: GKU cosmology, BBDDH neuroscience, PRT phase resonance, and Hikari currency. Defines the design principles of a resonance-based civilization.

papers.title: PRT v2 — Phase Resonance Theory
papers.title_ja: PRT v2 — 位相共鳴理論
papers.abstract: Phase Resonance Theory v2. Proposes that phase resonance is the fundamental mechanism underlying consciousness, matter, and civilizational coherence.

papers.title: OSI Philosophical Version
papers.abstract: Philosophical foundations of the OSI (Ontological Structure of Identity) framework. Explores the nature of self, identity, and civilizational consciousness.

papers.title: OSI Clinical & Industrial Proposal
papers.abstract: Clinical and industrial applications of the OSI framework. Practical proposals for implementing OSI principles in healthcare and organizational design.

papers.title: Hikari Currency → Status Score
papers.title_ja: 光貨→ステータス・スコア
papers.abstract: Defines the Hikari (光貨) currency system and its conversion to Status Scores. A new economic paradigm where virtue, contribution, and resonance are the sources of value.

papers.title: Hikari Currency Economic Implementation Design
papers.abstract: Detailed implementation design for the Hikari currency economy. Covers infrastructure, governance, and integration with existing economic systems.

papers.title: Density Moves the World v2.0
papers.title_ja: 密度が世界を動かす v2.0
papers.abstract: Proposes that informational and consciousness density is the primary driver of civilizational change. V2.0 integrates GKU and Hikari frameworks.

papers.title: TheYKHC Master Map — Complete Thought Architecture
papers.abstract: A complete 5-layer map of the TheYKHC thought system: GKU cosmology → BBDDH/PRT neuroscience → Hikari economics → Genesis OS civilization → Three Pillars of Perpetual Design (Love, Compassion, Justice).

papers.title: Chapter 75.0 — Three Pillars of Human Perpetuation
papers.title_ja: 第75.0節 人類永続の三主軸
papers.abstract: The three pillars that allow civilization to transcend entropy: Love, Compassion, and Justice. When implemented in the Hikari OS core, civilization synchronizes with the Heavenly Way (天道).
